use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::{Arc, RwLock};

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, Clone)]
struct UserProfile {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    preferences: HashMap<String, String>,
}

struct Cache {
    // GOOD: stores deserialized struct, deserialize once on insert
    store: RwLock<HashMap<String, UserProfile>>,
}

impl Cache {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            store: RwLock::new(HashMap::new()),
        }
    }

    fn insert(&self, key: &str, value: &UserProfile) {
        self.store.write().unwrap().insert(key.to_string(), value.clone());
    }

    fn get(&self, key: &str) -> Option<UserProfile> {
        let guard = self.store.read().unwrap();
        guard.get(key).cloned()
    }
}

async fn handle_request(cache: Arc<Cache>, user_id: &str) -> UserProfile {
    cache.get(user_id).expect("user not found")
}
